content: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' - adding return_positions param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will try to keep changes minimal/localized to encode() and encode_ordinary() methods.

agent1: Added 'return_positions: bool = False' as the last kwonly param on Encoding.encode() (after disallowed_special), only touching encode() not encode_ordinary(). Implementation computes positions via decode_with_offsets(tokens) after core_bpe.encode() succeeds, doesn't touch text before allowed_special/disallowed_special logic. Returns tokens unchanged when False, (tokens, positions) tuple when True. Should merge cleanly with your transformers param since we're in different parts of the function body/signature.
